settings.tagline: Building the Next Era Through Technology
settings.mission: Empower businesses with intelligent digital solutions.
settings.vision: Build Nepal's most innovative technology company while serving clients globally.

services.title: AI Solutions
services.shortDesc: Custom LLM integrations, intelligent agents, and ML pipelines built for real business outcomes.
services.description: We design and ship production AI systems — from customer-facing chatbots and internal copilots to document intelligence and predictive models — integrated directly into your existing workflows.

services.title: Web Development
services.shortDesc: High-performance web platforms engineered for speed, SEO, and conversion.
services.description: From marketing sites to complex web applications, we build with modern frameworks for performance, accessibility, and long-term maintainability.

services.title: Mobile App Development
services.shortDesc: Cross-platform apps that feel native, shipped fast without compromising quality.
services.description: We build iOS and Android apps from a single codebase using Flutter and React Native, backed by robust APIs and CI/CD pipelines.

services.title: Cloud Solutions
services.shortDesc: Scalable, secure cloud architecture built to handle real traffic.
services.description: We architect and manage cloud infrastructure on AWS, GCP, and Cloudflare — built for resilience, security, and cost efficiency at scale.

services.title: Business Automation
services.shortDesc: Workflow automation that eliminates manual work and connects your stack.
services.description: We identify repetitive operational bottlenecks and automate them — connecting your tools, data, and teams into one seamless system.

services.title: Enterprise Software
services.shortDesc: Mission-critical internal systems built with security and compliance first.
services.description: We build ERPs, CRMs, and custom internal platforms for organizations that need reliability, access control, and long-term support.

services.title: UI/UX Design
services.shortDesc: Interfaces designed with intention — every pixel earns its place.
services.description: From product strategy to high-fidelity prototypes, our design process is rooted in research, usability, and brand identity.

services.title: DevOps
services.shortDesc: CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code, and zero-downtime deployments.
services.description: We set up the infrastructure discipline behind reliable software — automated pipelines, observability, and infrastructure as code.

services.title: SaaS Development
services.shortDesc: Full-cycle SaaS builds — from MVP to multi-tenant platform.
services.description: We take SaaS products from idea to scale: multi-tenancy, billing, authentication, and the operational tooling needed to grow.

testimonials.name: Krishna Yadav
testimonials.quote: Hey i'm Krishna Yadav the founder of YugNirman Technologies . We deliver you a best service here.
